indian.details: Apply online for an e-ILP before travel. Valid 15–30 days. Needs a photo ID and passport photo. Siliguri Holidays files this for you within 48 hours of booking.

foreigner.details: Groups of 2+ travelling via a registered tour operator with a fixed itinerary. Siliguri Holidays is a registered operator and arranges PAP.

indian.details: Required for all Indian nationals entering Nagaland. Apply online via the Nagaland e-ILP portal. Siliguri Holidays files this for you within 48 hours of booking.

foreigner.details: As of December 2024 the Protected Area Permit has been reinstated for Nagaland — the earlier on-arrival relaxation no longer applies. Foreign nationals travel in groups of 2+ via a registered operator with a fixed itinerary. Siliguri Holidays is a registered operator and arranges the PAP in advance.

indian.details: Required for Indian nationals entering Manipur. Apply online via the Manipur ILP portal. Siliguri Holidays files this on your behalf within 48 hours of booking.

foreigner.details: As of December 2024 the Protected Area Permit applies to foreign nationals visiting Manipur. Travel is arranged through a registered operator with a fixed itinerary; you should also register with the Foreigners Registration Office (FRO) on arrival. Siliguri Holidays handles the PAP and accompanies you through registration. Note: re-confirm conditions close to travel, as Manipur advisories can change.

region: Sikkim (Gangtok, North Sikkim, Tsomgo, Nathu La)

indian.details: No ILP needed to enter Sikkim. However, Tsomgo Lake, Nathu La Pass, and North Sikkim require separate special permits arranged through a registered operator. Siliguri Holidays handles all zone-specific permits as part of your itinerary.

foreigner.details: A Restricted Area Permit (RAP) is required for all of Sikkim; a Protected Area Permit (PAP) is additionally needed for North Sikkim and border zones. Both are arranged by Siliguri Holidays as a registered operator. Apply at least 21 days before departure.

indian.details: No Inner Line Permit or special permit is needed for Meghalaya. Carry a valid government-issued photo ID (Aadhaar, passport, or voter card) at all times.

foreigner.details: No special permit is required for foreign nationals visiting Meghalaya. Carry your passport and a valid Indian visa. Standard customs and immigration rules apply.

indian.details: No Inner Line Permit or special permit is needed for Assam. Carry a valid government-issued photo ID. Entry to Kaziranga National Park requires a park entry fee paid at the gate.

foreigner.details: No special permit is required for foreign nationals visiting Assam. Carry your passport and a valid Indian visa. Park entry fees apply at Kaziranga.
